# Support

Need help with Toolost SDK docs or usage?

## Channels

| Topic               | Where                              | Notes                                |
| ------------------- | ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| SDK usage questions | GitHub issues in toolostjs/toolost | Include a small reproducible snippet |
| Bug reports         | GitHub issues in toolostjs/toolost | Add expected vs actual behavior      |
| Security concerns   | Root SECURITY policy               | Use private disclosure only          |
| Documentation fixes | Pull request to `www/` docs        | Include locale updates when possible |

## Useful Links

- Main repository: https://github.com/toolostjs/toolost
- SDK package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/toolost
- Too Lost developers: https://toolost.com/developers
